name_cn:
Large
MIUMIU Long Handle Baguette Bag
Recently inspired by the trendy long-handle baguette design. The 24 Fall/Winter new arrival revolves around a 'girlish sentiment' with a scholarly vibe. It embodies an uninhibited and elegant young lady's attitude and a casual outlook on life, unique to Miu Miu girls. Not too big or small, just right. Sweet, spicy, or cool. The capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical. Hard not to love it.
Size: Base 28×8×16cm
